Explanation: The question asks for the name of the first ship to become active. We need to look at the 'years active' column for each ship and determine which one became active the earliest. 

From the original table:
- Henry J. Kaiser (T-AO-187) has the years active listed as 1986–present.
- Joshua Humphreys (T-AO-188) has the years active listed as 1987-1996; 2005-2006; 2010-present.
- John Lenthall (T-AO-189) has the years active listed as 1987-1996; 1998–present.
- The other ships have their earliest active years starting from 1987 onwards.

The earliest active year listed is 1986 for Henry J. Kaiser. Therefore, the Prediction Answer 'Henry J. Kaiser' is correct.
